author: jtraglia
content: The note there is correct. Why would the deposit be dropped?

author: jtraglia
content: That is only true if you make a 0x03 deposit right now.

author: jtraglia
content: And the pending deposit is processed before the Gloas upgrade.

author: jtraglia
content: The "refund" is via [the builder withdrawal sweep](https://ethspec.tools/#specs/v1.7.0-alpha.8/functions-get_builders_sweep_withdrawals) btw.

author: nc1234
content: Ah right 👍 got confused because here is the only place that the term "refund" is used

author: m.kalinin
content: I think `validator.md` would be a better place for `should_build_on_full` than the fork choice spec. wdyt?

author: m.kalinin
content: Also, `gloas/validator.md` still uses `should_extend_payload` while from the context of `should_build_on_full` PR `should_extend_payload` usage should had been replaced with `should_build_on_full`

author: sukunrt
content:
This is the gossipsub flag: 
https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/blob/develop/beacon-chain/p2p/pubsub.go#L168
I think prysm sets it to 10MB by default.

author: sukunrt
content: Note: ^ this is a single limit for all message types, payload, attestation, aggregation everything.
